name: output_norm_bypass_exp013
hypothesis: Phase-2 mechanism variant: the per-head L2 output norm (F.normalize(routed)*sqrt(V)*self.norm) squashes the retrieval signal — it erases the magnitude difference between 'retrieved the right value' and 'guessed a format', leaving only direction, which CE on format tokens can satisfy alone. A small un-normalized residual bypass (+0.1*routed) lets the retrieval logit magnitude grow past the format ceiling while keeping the GDN3 norm for stability. If tokacc climbs past 0.30, normalization was capping retrieval; if not, the bottleneck is the lane router.
